title: CBC: Tallyho
description: A texture pack that changes Tallyho models and textures to look more similar to CBC
body:
[![RubyHost Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/734de55b9d68de8d0d141c95b975144be608660a_0.webp)](https://billing.rubyhost.net/aff.php?aff=22)
# CBC: Tallyho
**CBC: Tallyho** was made to bring **Tallyho** and **Create Big Cannon** & **CBC:MW** closer, with missiles using HE, HEAT and HE-F textures to differentiate them more easily from just looking.

It also fixes some issues with Tallyho, like Thermals Block using the Scope Block model and updating the lang so items aren't called **"item.tallyho.aim9lima"** anymore but their respective names like **"Aim-9 Lima"**.

![Missiles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7b3c58af976433b0792d4af79c4890f58b50fbd.gif)
![Bombs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ba049d2580bda6ef57498335aa1ee4a5773ff87.gif)
